name: analytics.kpiSummary
description: Query aggregated KPI summary from analytics warehouse showing PRD success metrics: behavior reuse %, token savings %, task completion rate, and compliance coverage %.

start_date.description: Optional ISO format date (YYYY-MM-DD) to filter results from this date forward

end_date.description: Optional ISO format date (YYYY-MM-DD) to filter results up to this date

snapshot_time.description: Timestamp when the snapshot was taken

behavior_reuse_pct.description: Percentage of runs that cited at least one handbook behavior (target: 70%)

total_runs.description: Total number of workflow runs in the period

runs_with_behaviors.description: Number of runs that used behaviors

average_token_savings_pct.description: Average token reduction percentage compared to baseline (target: 30%)

task_completion_rate_pct.description: Percentage of terminal runs that completed successfully (target: 80%)
